nasb.text: I will come upon him while he is weary and exhausted and terrify him, so that all the people who are with him will flee. Then I will strike down the king alone,

esv.text: I will come upon him while he is weary and discouraged and throw him into a panic, and all the people who are with him will flee. I will strike down only the king,

cnv.text: 趁他疲乏手軟的時候，忽然追上他，使他驚惶失措，與他在一起的人就必逃跑；我只要單單擊殺王一人，

ccb.text: 趁他疲惫无力的时候袭击他，使他惊慌失措，他的部下必逃命。我只把王一个人杀掉，
